response: "Take Me" is a song recorded by Frank Sinatra, an American singer, actor, and producer who was one of the most popular and influential musical artists of the 20th century. Sinatra, born Francis Albert Sinatra in Hoboken, New Jersey, began his musical career in the swing era and gained fame as a solo artist after signing with Columbia Records in 1943. He became the idol of the "bobby soxers" and released his debut album, "The Voice of Frank Sinatra," in 1946. Known for his versatility and enduring popularity, Sinatra was one of the best-selling music artists of all time, selling over 150 million records worldwide.
